key_insights.insight: The feeling of 'not belonging' can be lessened by finding and focusing on activities you enjoy.
key_insights.quote: Focus on finding things you enjoy, like things that you likedoing, activities, and I mean anything, running, playing a sport, reading, like any activitywith your hands.

key_insights.insight: A good friendship encourages you to grow and reminds you of the best parts of yourself.
key_insights.quote: I think fundamentally that's what great friendship is, is somebody who sees a part of you thatyou wish to grow more of, and then every time you're meeting with them, they're encouragingit and they're reminding you of it.

key_insights.insight: Community is essential for thriving, and friendship is a purely chosen relationship.
key_insights.quote: I think that community is literallythe most important thing in everybody's life,not just my life, everybody's life.

key_insights.insight: It's crucial to choose the right people to surround yourself with, as they shape you.
key_insights.quote: I'm so conscious of choosing my friends.Because I think that's me actively choosing the people who are goingto keep shaping me as I live my life.

key_insights.insight: We have to give ourselves a break from the news, so we don't get stuck in the meaningless cycles.
key_insights.quote: Give yourself a break from the news. You'll know what's happening. In fact, if you read the news once a week,I promise you you will be as informedas somebody who's reading it every single day.

key_insights.insight: Learning to understand and acknowledge your feelings in therapy, rather than just intellectualizing them, is crucial for growth.
key_insights.quote: The thing I've had to learn in therapy is the feeling part, not the thinking part.

key_insights.insight: You can connect to a person online in honest and beautiful ways because you're safer in a way.
key_insights.quote: I think a lot of people will be shocked at how you can connect to a person online inlike a really honest and beautiful way because you're safer in a way.

key_insights.insight: The joy comes from standing in line (friction) with your friends for an hour, just enjoying being.
key_insights.quote: What we didn't realize was we love the theme parks because it forced us to stand in lineStarting point is 01:22:13for an hour as friends and just be.

actionable_advice.advice: Find a way to 'lime' with your friends.
actionable_advice.how_to: Spend time together with no specific agenda or planned activity. Just be present and connect.

actionable_advice.advice: Practice being present and noticing your surroundings to break negative thought patterns.
actionable_advice.how_to: Walk down the street and name the things you see out loud. This helps shift your focus away from internal loops.

actionable_advice.advice: Before addressing complex issues, check in with your body.
actionable_advice.how_to: Ask yourself if you've slept well, eaten good food, moved your body, and spent time breathing. Address any deficiencies before overthinking.
Find online communities that support the specific areas you may struggle, or are seeking support for. Join the Reddit communities, or online game groups

actionable_advice.advice: If you are a man, try to check in with your feelings
actionable_advice.how_to: Try to express yourself in a way, and don't just mask these up with anger or other short term distractions

memorable_stories: Story of how Trevor was reunited with his biological father, and how important that was to him.
Story of John Stewart preparing him for people not liking him when he took the chair at the Daily Show.
Story of the chicken squad farm that Trevor and his mother bought and how that lead to great insights.
contrarian_claims: You can be more informed reading the news once per week.
The middle class is an invented thing propped up by governments.
People should find online communites to solve their issues.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Trevor Noah: My Depression Was Linked To ADHD! Why I Left The Daily Show!
